subcodes.first_line: We desired to send unto one of Our loved ones the pearls of the ocean of Our grace and utterance, that thou mayest render thanks and say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نرسل الی احد احبائی لئالی بحر عنایتی و بیانی لتشکر و تقول لک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @Hands of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions
